summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Student Portal application - both backend APIs and frontend UI are working correctly with all authentication flows functional

minor_issues.issue: Returns 403 instead of 401 for unauthorized access

ui_bugs.issue: React warning about missing 'key' prop in list items
ui_bugs.impact: Console warning only, no functional impact

passed_tests: Public dropdowns API returning departments and courses
Admin Dashboard shows stats (1 student, 1 faculty, 3 departments)
Admin can view All Users page with 3 users
Student Dashboard loads with profile info for Nashil Singh
Login page loads correctly with proper form elements
Logout functionality working for all roles
Database seeding creates test users successfully

success_percentage.backend: 83% (10/12 tests passed - 2 minor status code issues)
success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all login flows, dashboards, and navigation working)
